goal: Identify the top-20 heaviest assets in a 34k-prim DC scene and produce a concrete optimization path that preserves RTX visual fidelity while making room for 64 AMRs.
thoughts: Numbers first, then plan. find_heavy_prims top-20 with poly + instance counts. check_vram_headroom to turn '64 AMRs?' into an actual GB estimate. optimize_scene applies instancing/LOD — never propose dropping RTX quality; the twin is her pitch. 80k-tri vendor racks can stay IF instanced across 18 aisles (one mesh, 18 instance draws). Animated belt textures are a real instancing gotcha — flag honestly. Accept her correction from 64 to 58+6 AMRs and recompute.
code:
# Numbers before recommendations.

# 1. Top-20 heaviest
find_heavy_prims(
    stage_path="<DC_STAGE>",
    top_n=20,
    metric="triangle_count"
)

# 2. VRAM headroom — turn '64 AMRs' into an actual GB delta
check_vram_headroom(
    stage_path="<DC_STAGE>",
    projected_additions=[
        {"asset": "omniverse://ov-prod/Library/Robots/amr_mir250.usd", "count": <64>}
    ]
)

# 3. Baseline scene analysis
run_stage_analysis(stage_path="<DC_STAGE>")

# 4. Optimize (instancing + LOD, not quality drop)
optimize_scene(
    stage_path="<DC_STAGE>",
    enable_instancing=True,
    enable_lod=True,
    preserve_rtx_quality=True
)

# Concrete levers to tell Fatima:
#   - Rack meshes: 80k tris x 18 aisles = 1.44M tris unique. Instanced: 80k + 18
#     transforms. Keep vendor fidelity, pay the cost once.
#   - Conveyor loops with animated belt textures: instancing ok for geometry,
#     but per-instance material parameters (belt phase) break GPU instancing —
#     expect to shard per-loop, not naive replicate.
#   - LODs on rack clutter at >30 m from camera — free perf, no visual cost.
# If she corrects 64 -> 58+6, re-run check_vram_headroom with count=58.
# Don't suggest lowering RTX preset. Her twin is a demo artifact.
failure_modes: Proposing 'lower RTX quality' — her twin is a pitch to ops, fidelity matters
Missing the animated-belt-texture instancing gotcha (breaks naive GPU instancing)
Not recomputing with her 58+6 correction — feels like you weren't listening
Vague 'reduce polys' advice instead of specific instancing + LOD levers
